subject: refactor(ui): migrate 150+ buttons to DaisyUI btn component classes
body:
Replace hand-rolled Tailwind button styling across all components with
DaisyUI btn classes. Consistent sizing, hover states, focus rings, and
disabled states now managed by the framework instead of per-component.

Mapping:
- Primary CTAs → btn btn-primary (btn-sm/btn-xs by context)
- Ghost/secondary → btn btn-ghost
- Destructive → btn btn-error
- Success → btn btn-success
- Toggle segments → btn-primary (active) / btn-ghost (inactive)
- Icon-only → btn btn-ghost btn-square
- Outline → btn btn-outline

23 component files updated. Bundle: 1308→1302 KiB (-6 KiB).
Button migration TODO item completed and removed from docs/TODO.md.

Tags: ui, daisyui, buttons, refactor, consistency
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
